Successful Case Wins

A selection of our notable achievements and courtroom successes in service matters, family disputes, civil litigation, and criminal defense.

State of Rajasthan v. Verma - wrongful Dismissal Reinstated

Successfully contested the termination of a senior government officer. The High Court ordered complete reinstatement with retrospective seniority rights and full back-wages.

View Judgment Download PDF

Secured Anticipatory Bail in Dowry Harassment Allegation (Section 498-A)

Successfully argued for anticipatory bail before the High Court for the husband's immediate family members, demonstrating a lack of specific allegations in the complaint.

View Judgment Download PDF

Retrospective Promotion & Pensionary Benefits Decreed - CAT Jodhpur

Obtained a favorable judgment in the Central Administrative Tribunal directing department heads to grant retrospective promotion and release delayed pension amounts with interest.

View Judgment Download PDF

Commercial FIR Quashed under Section 482 CrPC

The High Court accepted our petition and quashed criminal proceedings in a commercial matter, establishing that the dispute was of a civil contractual nature rather than criminal.

View Judgment Download PDF

Specific Performance Decreed in Property Partition Suit

Secured a civil court decree for specific performance of property partition, directing the partition and handover of the rightful share of ancestral land to the client.

View Judgment Download PDF

Financial Dispute Recovery - Section 138 NI Act Conviction Upheld

Represented the complainant in a cheque dishonour case. The appellate court upheld the conviction and ordered the drawer to pay twice the cheque value as compensation.

View Judgment Download PDF

Child Custody Secured for Aggrieved Mother

Successfully represented a mother in child custody proceedings, proving that the child's developmental interests were best served under the mother's guardianship.

View Judgment Download PDF

Magistrate Protection Order under Domestic Violence Act

Obtained protection and residential maintenance orders for the client, securing her right to remain in the shared marital household without disturbance.

View Judgment Download PDF

Arbitration Award Confirmed in Partnership Accounting Dispute

Successfully defended a partnership firm in court, securing the execution and enforcement of a favorable arbitration award for contract recovery.

View Judgment Download PDF

District Consumer Commission Order - Real Estate Refund

Secured an order from the Consumer Forum directing a developer to refund the full booking amount with interest and compensation due to a long delay in delivering possession.

View Judgment Download PDF

Suspension of Sentence Allowed in Criminal Appeal

Obtained suspension of sentence and bail for the appellant in Jodhpur Sessions Court during the pendency of the appeal against conviction.

View Judgment Download PDF

Hindu Marriage Act - Restitution of Conjugal Rights Allowed

Represented the petitioner in a petition under Section 9 of the Hindu Marriage Act. The court decreed in favor of conjugal restitution.

View Judgment Download PDF

No successful cases recorded at this time.
